etymology.description: 土(土) (tǔ, "earth") triplicated -> symbolizes tall or towering earth
etymology.interpretation: The character 垚(yáo) depicts three 土(土) (tǔ, "earth") stacked upon each other, visually suggesting a tall, elevated mass of earth or land. This configuration effectively conveys the concept of height or elevation in an earthly context by emphasizing the repetition of the 'earth' element, underscoring its meaning as 'tall (of earth)'.
